tasks.label: Start RepoAtlas
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM python3.13.exe 2>nul & timeout /t 2 & cd backend && C:/Users/ASUS/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps/python3.13.exe -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
